subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 743868421/240728588 is not a GRB
body:
L. Scotton (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 743868421/240728588 at 14:06:56.55 UT on 28 July 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to SAA exit."
